problems.title: Reverse Words
problems.prompt: Given a string s containing words separated by spaces, reverse the order of the words. Collapse multiple spaces into a single space and trim leading/trailing spaces from the result.
constraints: s contains English letters, digits, and spaces

problems.title: Valid Anagram
problems.prompt: Given two strings s and t, return true if t is an anagram of s, and false otherwise. An anagram uses the exact same characters with the same frequencies.
constraints: s and t consist of lowercase English letters

problems.title: Clean Palindrome
problems.prompt: Given a string s, return true if it is a palindrome after converting all uppercase letters to lowercase and removing all non-alphanumeric characters. Otherwise return false.

examples.input: s = "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"

constraints: s consists of printable ASCII characters

samples.input: "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"

problems.title: Longest Unique Substring
problems.prompt: Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring that contains no repeating characters.
constraints: s consists of English letters, digits, symbols, and spaces

problems.title: Group Anagrams
problems.prompt: Given an array of strings strs, group the anagrams together. You may return the groups in any order. Two strings are anagrams if they contain the same characters with the same frequencies.
constraints: strs[i] consists of lowercase English letters

problems.title: String Compression
problems.prompt: Compress a character array chars using run-length encoding in-place. For consecutive repeating characters, keep the character followed by its count (if count > 1). Return the new length of the compressed array. Counts of 10 or more use multiple digits.
constraints: chars[i] is a lowercase English letter, digit, or symbol

problems.title: Palindrome Partitions
problems.prompt: Given a string s, partition it so that every substring of the partition is a palindrome. Return all possible palindrome partitionings of s. You may return them in any order.
constraints: s consists of lowercase English letters

problems.title: Edit Distance
problems.prompt: Given two strings word1 and word2, return the minimum number of operations required to convert word1 into word2. Allowed operations are insert a character, delete a character, or replace a character.
constraints: word1 and word2 consist of lowercase English letters
